hook: Your heart could be older or younger than you think.

script.hook: Your heart could be older or younger than you think.
beats: Two people can be the same age chronologically but have very different cardiovascular ages.
A coronary artery calcium (CAC) score can reveal hidden plaque in your arteries, impacting your heart health.
Lifestyle factors can significantly influence these measurements, but results can vary widely.
script.close: Follow BestKarma for science-backed health without the hype.

visualPlan: Show two people of the same age with different heart health metrics.
Display a CAC score chart highlighting the risk levels.
Illustrate lifestyle changes that can improve cardiovascular age.
End with a call to action to measure cardiovascular age.

captions.instagram: Your heart's age might surprise you! Learn how to measure it. #HeartHealth #Longevity
captions.facebook: Did you know your heart could be aging differently than your chronological age? Find out how to measure it! #HeartHealth
captions.tiktok: Your heart might be older than you think! Here’s how to measure your cardiovascular age. #HealthTips
captions.youtube: Is your heart older than your birth certificate says? Discover how to measure and improve your cardiovascular age.

titles.instagram: Is Your Heart Older Than You Think?

complianceNotes: Do not imply diagnosis or treatment.
Retain at least one meaningful caveat from the article.
